title: Udemy India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Udemy India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
We at Udemy India Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Subject Matter Expert based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Udemy India Asia Pacific Associates:
Udemy India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Udemy India Asia Pacific Associates!
